name: dev.asp.services.streaming
title: Live Tracking Stream
description: Adds real-time WebSocket streaming to ASP order tracking. Provides continuous agent location updates, status transition events, and heartbeat keep-alives over a persistent connection.

stream_subscribe.description: Client-to-server message to start receiving tracking events for an order.

order_id.description: Identifier of the order to track.

token.description: Bearer token for authentication. Sent in the first message since WebSocket handshake does not support custom HTTP headers in browsers.

stream_unsubscribe.description: Client-to-server message to stop receiving tracking events for an order.

order_id.description: Identifier of the order to stop tracking.

stream_event.description: Server-to-client event envelope. See tracking_stream_event.json for the full schema.
